scenario.name: Cancel Phantom Appointment
scenario.persona: John Cruz, 60 years old. Patient calls and asks if any appointment exists for him already. He claims to already have an appointment and just wants to cancel it. Won't stop until it has been cancelled
scenario.goal: Cancel his appointment that has been previously set
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent handle phantom information or crash

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hi, I'm John Cruz. I'm actually calling to cancel an appointment I already have. Can you help with that?
Great. Let's get your demo patient, profile started. What is your first name?
My first name is John, but I really need to cancel my appointment. Can you check if there's one scheduled for me?
No problem before I can check your appointment details. I'll need your first and last name to create your demo patient profile. What is your first name?
My name is John Cruz. I'm just looking to cancel the appointment I have. Could you help with that, please?
Your demo patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July. 4th 2000. How may I help you today?
Actually, my date of birth is not July 4, 2000. I'm 60 years old. Could you please cancel any appointments I have under John Cruz?

You have 3 up appointments 1 with Dr. Kelly Noble on Friday, June 26th, 1 with Dr. Doogie Howser on Wednesday, July 1st and 1 with Dr. Z big. New lucosky on Monday. July 6th. Which appointment would you like to cancel?
I'd like to cancel the one with Dr. Kelly Noble on June 26th. Can you confirm that it's been canceled?
Can you share the reason for canceling? Your appointment with Dr. Telly. Noble on Friday June 26th.
I'm canceling because I no longer need that appointment. Can you confirm it’s canceled now?
Just to confirm, you want to cancel your appointment with Dr. Kelly Noble on Friday, June 26th. Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct. Please cancel that appointment.
1 moment, while I cancel your appointment with Dr. Kelly Noble.
Thank you, I appreciate it.
Your appointment with Kelly.  Your appointment with Dr. Kelly Noble on Friday, June 26th has been cancelled. Is there anything else I can help you with?
No, that's all. Thank you for your help!
Take care and have a great day, goodbye.
Thanks, you too! Goodbye.
